channel.title: XPLR on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in XPLR on Mizubikes

item.title: SRAM Force E1 2x vs 1x vs XPLR: Gearing and Gear Jumps Compared
item.description: SRAM Force E1 gearing compared cog by cog — 10-33 vs 10-36 vs 13-speed XPLR 10-46, with the actual gear jumps behind the range numbers.

item.title: SRAM 1x on a Road Bike: Is It Finally Worth It?
item.description: 1x road drivetrains are showing up more in the pro peloton. Here's what those setups actually look like, what SRAM Force XPLR changes, and whether your bike can even run it.
